Cześć, jestem Sandra 👋
Moja droga do marzeń nie była prosta — była kręta, zaskakująca i pełna odwagi. 

Rzucenie studiów i wyjazd do Peru? Brzmi jak szaleństwo. Okazało się najlepszą decyzją mojego życia. To tam zrozumiałam, że życie nie musi być „bezpieczne" — może być kolorowe, pasjonujące i wolne.

Dziś jestem certyfikowaną kolorystką i stylistką, która każdego dnia łączy biznes z tym, co kocha od zawsze — kolory, moda, sztuka ✨

A gdy nie pracuję? Tańczę, uciekam w naturę, podróżuję i tworzę muzykę w SUNO.ai (nowa obsesja, polecam 😄)

Jeśli dotarłaś do końca tej karuzeli — to znak, że chętnie Cię poznam 🤍 Napisz do mnie jaka jest Twoja historia?

#kolorystka #stylistka #mojahistoria #analizakolorystyczna#analizakolorystycznaonline

Jak pracuję i co jest dla mnie najważniejsze?
Moja filozofia to 3 słowa: wolność, autentyczność, pasja.

Nie ma szablonów. Nie ma "musisz to nosić, bo tak mówi moda". Nie ma oceniania.
Jest za to: indywidualne podejście, komfort, zaufanie i wspólne tworzenie stylu, który będzie w 100% TWÓJ.

Bo wiem, że prowadzisz intensywne życie. Zarządzasz biznesem, zespołem, dbasz o rodzinę. Często nie masz czasu dla siebie. A garderoba? To ostatnia rzecz, o której myślisz rano.

Dlatego jestem.
Pomagam kobietom stworzyć system, spójny styl i garderobę, w której poczują się pewnie i w zgodzie ze sobą. Bez stresu.

Każde spotkanie to dla mnie osobna historia. Odkrywam to, co czyni Cię TOBĄ. Twoje oryginalne wyróżniki stylu. Bo nie przebieram kobiet - wydobywam to, co w nich najlepsze.

Czerń, beż i granat są dla każdej szafy kapsułowej? Nie do końca. 👇

Szafa kapsułowa to jedna z najlepszych rzeczy, które możesz zrobić dla swojej codziennej rutyny — mniej stresu rano, mniej impulsywnych zakupów, więcej poczucia, że masz swój styl. Ale gdzieś po drodze ten koncept obrastał w jeden wielki mit: że kapsuła = neutralna paleta.

I tu pojawia się problem numer jeden — te "neutralne" kolory wcale nie są neutralne dla każdego.

Kapsuła to filozofia. Nie paleta.

Przejdź przez karuzele i sprawdź, jak dobrać kolory bazowe do siebie.

Zapisz, jeśli budujesz swoją kapsułę 🔖
Obserwuj, żeby nie przegapić kolejnych wskazówek.

"Czarny wyszczupla" — słyszałaś to pewnie setki razy. Ale czy wiesz, dlaczego? I co robić, jeśli czarny Ci nie służy? 🖤

To nie magia ani mit. To czysta optyka — i da się to wytłumaczyć naukowo.

Czarny odbija bardzo mało światła, przez co na tkaninie widać mniej refleksów i wypukłości. Oko rejestruje mniej objętości. Efekt? Sylwetka wygląda spokojniej i smukle.

Problem w tym, że czarny nie jest uniwersalny. Przy jasnej, delikatnej urodzie może przytłaczać.

W tej karuzeli tłumaczę:
✔️ dlaczego czarny działa wyszczuplająco 
✔️ kiedy czarny Ci nie służy i co z tym zrobić
✔️ jakie inne kolory działają podobnie jak czerń — i są dla Ciebie lepsze

Zapisz ten post — przyda się przy następnych zakupach. 🔖

"A może się przyda..." — słynne ostatnie słowa każdej przepełnionej szafy 😂

Znasz to? Trzymasz w szafie:
Sukienkę "na wesele" (było 3 lata temu)
Szpilki (które bolą jak diabli)
Spodnie "jak schudnę"

I potem stajesz rano przed szafą i: "NIE MAM CO NA SIEBIE WŁOŻYĆ" 🤷‍♀️
DOŚĆ TEGO!

Dzisiaj daję Ci 5 pytań, które podejmą decyzję ZA CIEBIE. Bez wyrzutów sumienia, bez zastanawiania się godzinami.

✨ 5 PROSTYCH PYTAŃ:
1️⃣ Jaki jest stan tego ubrania? Zniszczone? Plamki? → Żegnaj.
2️⃣ Gdzie mam to założyć? Nie masz okazji? → Nie potrzebujesz.
3️⃣ Czy fason mi pasuje? Czujesz się w tym niezręcznie? Nie podkreśla sylwetki? → Nie zmuszaj się.
4️⃣ Czy ten kolor mi służy? Wyglądam blado? Zmęczona? → Pożegnanie.
5️⃣ Czy to jest mój rozmiar? "Jak schudnę" nie liczy się. Pasuje TERAZ? Jeśli nie → oddaj komuś.

Po przeglądzie według tych zasad: ✅ Szafa lżejsza o połowę ✅ Ubieranie się zajmuje 5 minut, nie 30 ✅ Koniec z "nie mam co włożyć" ✅ Wszystko, co masz, RZECZYWIŚCIE nosisz

 Dobre kolory działają jak naturalny filtr: cera wygląda zdrowiej, oczy bardziej wyraziste, a Ty po prostu lepiej.

I am a two-time cancer survivor and most recently had heart stent placement for early on coronary artery disease from my cancer radiation. Musk Santal | 34 -  Kayali Freedom line ✨

Could this be my new fave Kayali scent? Quite possibly 👀 I sampled this in Sephora a couple of weeks ago and then to my luck, I was gifted it 🥺🥺❤️ but bey believe once this runs out I’ll happily repurchase. 

This is the prettiest, softest, sweetest floral scent ever. The notes in this are curated beautifully to give a really delicate candied overtone. It almost reminds me of the candy necklaces- you know those sweets you’d wear as a child (or if you’re me wear now) and you could them as a bracelet too- those! But then it has a very mature musky/floral wrapping to it to give a really soft edge. 

I honestly love, loveeee this one and will be wearing it loads. It’s safe to say that not every release you’ll love but honestly this one- 10/10 for me. 

Will you be trying any from the freedom line? What’s your favourite? 

Thank you so much to the @kayali for the best gift ever. ❤️ always grateful!!

Sometimes the best ideas happen by accident.

While experimenting with different printing techniques, we wanted to create something that would combine them all in one design. That’s how this T-shirt was born.

This design uses our "Triple Light Effect" - one design that changes depending on the light around you.

We combined three different materials:
 "PEACE" – glow-in-the-dark vinyl
 "Peace symbol" – highly reflective vinyl
 "”NOT WAR”" – neon textured vinyl that becomes more visible when artificial light hits it

Triple Light Effect:
• Glow in the dark
• Reflective under light
• Neon textured vinyl

What started as a simple experiment suddenly felt very meaningful. In a world where there is too much conflict, the message is simple:

"PEACE. NOT WAR."

This T-shirt will be available in our shop very soon.
And this is just the beginning - we’re constantly experimenting and combining new techniques.

Stay tuned.

This project began with a simple passion for fashion and photography, and grew into a vision to create something meaningful. DHFC is not just a fashion calendar — it’s an attempt to bring together individuality, creativity, and modern style through visual storytelling.
Inspired by global fashion minds and built through collaboration, this journey is about shaping a new, fashion-forward creative crowd in Sri Lanka. This is only the beginning, and there is much more to create, explore, and share.
Grateful for everyone who supports, believes, and collaborates — especially the artists who bring this vision to life.

✨ DHFC – Dasun Harshitha Fashion Calendar ✨
A celebration of Sri Lankan creativity, style, and individuality. DHFC is more than a calendar—it’s a visual journey capturing the country’s finest actors, singers, and artists in fashion-driven concepts that speak confidence, personality, and timeless elegance.

Every shot is carefully crafted—from concept & styling to mood & composition—transforming each moment into a story that goes beyond aesthetics. DHFC is a living archive of contemporary Sri Lankan fashion, blending artistry, emotion, and identity into striking visuals.

Follow the journey for exclusive behind-the-scenes looks, concept previews, color explorations, and select frames that bring the calendar to life.

Where fashion meets storytelling, talent meets vision. #DHFC #SriLankanFashion #FashionPhotography #VisualStorytelling #CreativeCulture

Hi! I'm Katie. Welcome to Dopamine Divas!

✨ Who We are!

We’re the studio where colour runs wild and fabrics get a second life. 

A tiny Worcester workshop brewing joyful, sustainable style for people who prefer their wardrobes bright, not beige.

✨ What We Do!

We rework and transform clothing using upcycled and deadstock fabrics into one-off pieces that celebrate  bold expression.

✨ Why We Exist!

Fast fashion creates waste. 

We take items destined for landfill and give them a new lease of life by creating one of a kind items.

Less waste, more WOW!

✨ Who is Katie?

Late diagnosed AuDHD, a ‘regular job’ didnt cut it any more, so Dopamine Divas was born.

With over 30 years of experience at a sewing machine, and always rebelling against the latest fashion trends, it seemed the logical step to create bright, colourful clothing for others to express their own uniqueness!

A little reminder that we all make mistakes.

I'm so hard on myself, setting unattainable goal for myself, and I've been this way for as long as I can remember. I guess it's part of being AuDHD and constantly doing your best yet still always be behind.

Working with @neurocompass1 is gradually helping me to keep these kinds of expectations in check.

I have been sewing for 30 odd years, I'm still learning, I still make mistakes. It's ok, the world will not collapse because I stitched the bottom part of a pattern piece into the collar, or because I stitched across the entire back waist by accident meaning I had to unpick both.

Sure, it's irritating, but striving to be perfect constantly doesn't damage anyone but myself.

So yeah, bollocks to trying to strive for perfection, none of us are perfect!

#ADHD #neurodivergence #AuDHD #LateDiagnosed

NYFW TAKEOVER — SOUL OF AN ICON

As part of our NYFW Takeover, Soul of an Icon brought together creatives, industry leaders, and community to experience the work and legacy of Freddie Leiba.

These testimonials reflect the conversations, perspectives, and impressions shared throughout the exhibition.

Through archival imagery, storytelling, and dialogue, the experience offered a deeper look into decades of influence across fashion, culture, and image-making.

Thank you to everyone who attended and contributed their voice.

#FashionAllianceNetwork #NYFWTakeover #SoulOfAnIcon #NYFW #FreddieLeiba

Thank you @rebeccamosesofficial for your heartfelt insight and genuine love for Freddie Leiba. Your words brought depth, warmth, and perspective to Soul of an Icon, honoring his legacy in such a meaningful and powerful way. We are truly grateful for the way you helped share his story with such authenticity and grace.

Before the runways, before the editorials, there was Trinidad—a place rich in culture, color, and soul. It was here that Freddie Leiba’s love for fashion was first shaped, not in studios, but at home.
At the center of his story is his mother—his first inspiration, his first muse. Through her, he witnessed the power of presentation, pride, and personal style. Fashion was not about labels—it was about dignity, expression, and identity.
Those early moments—watching her prepare, carry herself, and show up with intention—planted the seed. A deep appreciation for beauty, detail, and storytelling through clothing.
From Trinidad to the global stage, that foundation never left him.
Thank you @Hiphop_preservingtheculture for all the edits.

Rivesse | NYFW TAKEOVER: Made by Hands

We are proud to present Rivesse as part of NYFW TAKEOVER: Made by Hands, a celebration of artistry, craftsmanship, and the enduring beauty of handmade fashion.

Rivesse creates beautiful works of art through hand-beaded fabrics and expert tailoring, blending intricate embellishment with refined garment construction. Each piece reflects patience, precision, and a deep appreciation for the tradition of  craftsmanship.

Through Made by Hands, we honor brands like Rivesse whose work reminds us that fashion, at its finest, is truly an art form.

#NYFWTakeover #MadeByHands #Rivesse #CoutureCraftsmanship #HandBeading

Lizab Couture is known for creating elaborate, handmade leather bags that merge artistry with craftsmanship. Each piece is meticulously constructed by hand, reflecting a deep dedication to detail, quality materials, and timeless design.

Through Made by Hands, we celebrate designers like Lizab Couture who honor the tradition of true artisan craftsmanship in fashion.

#NYFWTakeover #MadeByHands #LizabCouture #HandmadeLuxury #LeatherCraft

I managed to snag this lovely Brooklyn to match my blooming spiderwort from @wool.and ‘s clearance sale. The right size, and so flattering, I think.
No Kings! I’m super comfy while fighting fascism in my @wool.and dress. #wooland I might be converted to wool all the time.
One size smaller and a different shape-Camillia is a fab dress from @wool.and . Next dress I get should have sleeves, I’ve decided. Gotta get a little sun protection on these shoulders.

Today I’m physically and mentally catching up. Gotta figure out a lot of things: do I slam my course and take the test due by the 16th, or do I pay $ to transfer to the next testing period. How to manage my deregulation lately caused by overworking and fascism. How to prepare for school being out starting Friday and me being perimenopausal. How to help my kids navigate their divergence internally and inter-community. How to get more sleep. How to discern between tiredness and burnout. How to for my physical therapy exercises in— I started out great and now am feeling like there’s no breaks—as i@lay on the couch because being upright makes the burden of hope much heavier. How to take care of all those I’ve committed to (including this garden!) while wanting to hide away.  But the peony has started to bloom. So it’s possible. Nothing matters…and therefore everything matters. Love you. Do your best, and be sure to rest.
My @wool.and dress is good for the office or the streets. This is a screen grab of video that aired on Fox6 of the Ice Out protest today in my city.

Back to my wool& antics! I have some legal observing tonight, so more photos later!
#wooland
Garden and breakfast!
Life is good.

Day 30/30: I didn’t expect this to go so fast, and also to have illness and work and schedules keep me from protests. But there will be more to come. I’ve ordered another Wool& dress in what I think is my right size and I’ll be getting back into the streets. Revolutions come in all sizes, shapes, colors, and I want to be a part of what’s coming, not what we have left behind. C'è un momento in cui ti accorgi che qualcosa non va. Stai scorrendo il feed e tutti si assomigliano. Zigomi identici. Nasi rifatti allo stesso modo. Labbra con quella pienezza che non esiste in natura. Non è una coincidenza.

È l'estetica algoritmica al lavoro. I social media non si limitano a mostrarci immagini: le selezionano. E quello che ottiene più like finisce per ridefinire il nostro senso del bello — senza che ce ne accorgiamo. I chirurghi plastici hanno persino coniato un termine: Snapchat Dysmorphia. Pazienti che arrivano in studio con in mano non più le foto di una celebrity, ma la versione filtrata di sé stessi. Vogliono assomigliare a ciò che vedono sullo schermo.

Nel nuovo articolo di Glam Aura analizziamo come filtri, AI generativa e trend virali stiano costruendo un'estetica globale omologata — e cosa possiamo fare per difendere la nostra unicità. Lo trovi ora su glamaura.it

Wer von euch schläft auch auf Seidenkissen? ✨
@lwbern.ch 
Ich schlafe schon über 1Jahr auf Seide und merke wirklich einen Unterschied. Seide ist ein kleines Geheimnis für den Schönheitsschlaf, weil sie besonders sanft zu Haut und Haar ist. Ich kann nicht mehr ohne☺️
Es ist einfach soooo angenehm🙌

Der Beauty-Kissenbezug von der Leinenweberei Bern hilft dabei, die natürliche Feuchtigkeit der Haut besser zu bewahren, und die glatte Oberfläche reduziert die Reibung während der Nacht. Meine Haut fühlt sich morgens frischer und glatter an und auch meine Haare sind deutlich gesünder.

Die feine Seidenfaser schont die Haarstruktur und sorgt dafür, dass die Haare am Morgen gepflegter und glänzender sind. Für mich definitiv ein kleines Upgrade für den täglichen Schönheitsschlaf. ✨

Ich nehme meinen Seiden-Kissenbezug sogar immer mit auf Reisen☺️ so habe ich auch im Urlaub meinen kleinen Beauty-Komfort dabei💆‍♀️

I can’t help but notice the way sunshine feels on my skin, or wind in my hair. I take in the smells when flowers bloom in the spring, and when there’s freshly cut grass nearby. I could listen to birds sing and crickets chirp for hours, and the hum of cicadas has always been my version of the dinner bell. I prefer bare feet over shoes any day.. it’s made me more mindful of bees. I still chase fireflies and search for four-leaf clovers in every patch, and I’ve never come across a peach cobbler I could turn down. I guess you could say I romanticize life… but I can't see what’s not to love? 💕

The one whose hands are never still, whose heart carries a thousand small responsibilities… yet she rarely takes a moment for herself.

We see you.

Padmika was created for you the woman who gives everything and asks little.
For the mornings you rush, the evenings you cherish, the tiny victories that no one notices, but you do.
For the comfort you deserve, the confidence you need, and the style that belongs to your life not just a picture on a mannequin.

Affordable. Effortless. Flattering for real bodies, real routines, real lives.
Because being a woman in an Indian household doesn’t mean losing your own identity.
It means wearing your grace every day… without compromise.

This is Padmika.
Made for the women who make the world run quietly, beautifully, and completely.

Exploring the iconic Doraha Fort, Ludhiana — famously called RDB Fort after scenes from Rang De Basanti were shot here 🎬

Originally built in the early 17th century during the Mughal era as a caravan serai (rest stop for traders and travelers on the Delhi–Lahore route), this fort once welcomed merchants, horses, and royal convoys. Today, its raw brick arches and silent courtyards tell stories of history, cinema, and forgotten grandeur.

From Mughal architecture to Bollywood legacy — this place hits different ✨

#DorahaFort #RDBFort #PunjabDiaries #IndianHeritage #TravelIndia

Did you know your laundry has a footprint?  Between 1950 and 2016, an estimated 5.6 million metric tons of synthetic microfibers were released into the environment just from washing our clothes.

Every time we wash polyester, nylon, or acrylic, tiny plastic fibers break off and head straight for our oceans.  It’s a huge number, but small changes in how we do laundry can help turn the tide.

#sustainablefashion #ecofriendlyliving #laundry #oceanconservation #ogunstate

The heat isn’t just a vibe.
it’s actually changing the way we dress. 
From the rise of moisture-wicking tech to the way extreme sun literally melts the glue on our favorite sneakers, the climate is officially rewriting our style rules. 

Even that classic black dress is becoming a heat trap as it absorbs more energy than ever. 
We are moving into an era where our clothes have to work harder just to keep us cool and held together.

#ClimateChangeFashion #NigeriaHeatwave #EcoFriendlyOgun #FashionScience #StayCoolOgun

Together, we can drive change and secure clean water for all. 🌍💙
#WorldWaterDay2026 #WaterAdvocacy #ProtectOurWater #OgunEnvironment #cleanwaterforall

That trendy top isn't just fabric; it carries a hidden environmental debt. What seems like a small price at the store actually contributes to a much bigger problem.

When those cheap clothes quickly go out of style, they end up in massive textile dumps. Watch and learn about the environmental price tag of your clothes.

Your fashion decisions have a direct impact on our climate. Choose to be a part of the solution!

By 2050, the risk of hunger and malnutrition could rise by 20% due to the escalating climate crisis. This isn't just about changing weather; it’s about the stability of our plates and the health of future generations. 🌍🌾

When we talk about climate change, we are talking about a global food crisis. We cannot build a sustainable future if our food systems are under threat.

It’s time to bridge the gap between climate action and food security. Every degree matters. Every action counts.

It sounds like sci-fi, but it’s happening now: Climate change is literally ""watering down"" the nutrients in our crops.

As CO2 levels rise, plants may grow faster, but they often pack less protein, iron, and zinc. 
This means even if your plate looks the same, your body might not be getting what it needs.

Knowledge is the first step toward a more resilient food system.
Check the slides to see the full impact!

#ogun #nutritiontips #climateactionnow #healthyeating #globalhealth

When we talk about ""malnutrition,"" we’re talking about a complex cycle fueled by our changing environment. 
It isn't just about hunger; it's about the quality, availability, and balance of the nutrients we need to survive.

The solution lies in adaptation. 
We need hardy crops, better water management, and stronger social safety nets to ensure no one is left behind as the climate shifts.

#climatechangeisreal #malnutrition  #ogun #greenerogun #foodsystems

While the earth is covered in water, a staggering 0.5% is usable and available freshwater. 
Now, climate change is directly threatening this essential resource.

Over the last two decades, terrestrial water storage, which includes soil moisture, has declined at an alarming rate of 1 cm per year.

This shift carries major implications for our global water security.
It's more than a statistics; it's a wake-up call to protect our precious water resources.

#watercrisis #climatechange #ogunstate #environmentalprotection #nature sustainability

Water is our most precious resource, but climate change is rapidly rewriting the rules of how we access it. 
From the drying taps in our homes to the unpredictable surge of floodwaters in our rural communities, the crisis is already here. 

As extreme weather events become more frequent, we aren't just seeing a change in the weather, we are seeing the contamination of our clean water supplies and the destruction of the natural ecosystems, like wetlands and mangroves, that keep our planet inbalance.

Every tree cover lost and every over-pumped well makes us more vulnerable to a future where water is a luxury rather than a right. 
It’s time to recognise that protecting our climate is the only way to protect our water.

#climateactionogun #ogunstate #EnvironmentOgun #watersecurity #climatechangenigeria

When your well runs dry or the tap stops flowing,it’s easy to blame the pump.
The truth goes deeper,Climate change is shifting our rainfall patterns and drying out our groundwater faster than it can recharge.

We can’t keep treating water like an infinite resource when the climate is telling us otherwise.

What you can do today:

•Fix leaks immediately.

•Start exploring rainwater harvesting.

The water crisis is a climate crisis.

#OgunClimateChangeHub  #waterscarcity  #OgunState  #ClimateAction  #SaveWater

Ogun State Ministry of Environment in collaboration with Messrs Green Impact Advisory Limited- a Technical Partner on Climate Change, held strategic Stakeholders Engagement on Climate Governance Integration on Wednesday, March 4, 2026, with the goal of enlightening stakeholders to operationalise a multi-level climate governance in the State.
The meeting had in attendance State's Commissioners, Local Government Chairmen, Focal Persons from relevant Ministries, Departments and Agencies (MDAs), Local Government Areas (LGAs) and Environmental Health Officers.

Discussions during the engagement emphasised the need to strengthen climate data management, documentation, and reporting. Stakeholders also highlighted the importance of applying a climate lens to planning and decision-making processes across the State. These measures are expected to significantly enhance the State’s climate policy and action plan.

The meeting concluded with stakeholders’ commitment to support the multi-level climate governance structure in Ogun State.
#climateactionnow #Ogunstate #ogunupdate 
#unfccc #GatewayState

Did you know that in the peak of extreme heat, heatstroke can strike in just 10 to 15 minutes if you are not hydrated?

As climate change pushes our local temperatures higher every year, the "usual heat" we grew up with in Abeokuta, Ota, and Ijebu-Ode has changed. We are now seeing more "Extreme Heat Days" where the air traps moisture, and our bodies lose water faster than we can track.

This isn't just a "hot day",it’s a climate reality that demands we change our habits.

How to stay safe today:
• Drink before you're thirsty: If you feel thirsty, you're already dehydrated.
•Seek Natural Shade: Concrete traps heat; find trees to lower your body temp.
•Check on Others: The elderly and children in our communities are at the highest risk.

#ogunclimatechangehub #BeatTheHeatOgun #ClimateActionNG #heatstrokeawareness #ogunstate

(4.10.2025)💫🙏❣️
.
Betiya khekr kabhi apke charan sparsh nhi krne diye, par ek akhri baar jab unko chua tab jesa sukoon or duniya mai kahi nhi ✨️🙏. Ab maan sochta hai, khaas thoda or waqt diya hota apko, thodi der or apke sath masti ki hoti, apke thali mai apke haath se ek baar or kha leti, thodi or daant suun leti apki. 😭🫶🏻
.
Aaj apki 13vi par bhi yakin nhi ho raha ki aap humare sath nahi. Apke bina ghar, ghar sa nahi laag raha hai 😭🏠. Ghar wahi hai jaha aap ho. Apke bina toh din bhi adhure hai toh parivar toh hamesha adhura hee rahene wala hai 💔. Apki bohot yaad aaegi, ek akhiri baar ghar aakr, hum sabke sath bethkr wahi purane din ki tarah khana kaho, daanto, masti kro yeh hee ek icha rhegi bhagwan se 🙏. Jab pata chala aap nahi rahe tab esa laga ki saar ke upar se haath haat gaya, kuch andar hee andar tuth sa gaya, jindagi mai kuch adhura sa rhe jaega hamesha ke lia. Ab kisi ke bhi dada ko dekhti hu toh baas aap dikhte ho🫶🏻. Kabhi umid nhi thi aap ese chodkr chle jaoge hume💔. 
.
Par dadu kabhi chinta maat karna mai apke piche sabka dhyan achese rakhungi. Dadi ko sambhalungi, ab dadi ka dhyan rakhna meri first priority hogi 👵🙏. 
.
Bhagwan ko ache logo ki kaami ho rahi thi isliye apko bula lia aur hamesha ke liye humse duur kardiya, yeh toh bohot hee svarthe hua par aap sahi se apne aage ka safar karna. 😇✨️
.
Aap hamesha hum sabke dilo mai hai, yaado mai hai, bhavano mai hai. Apke ashirwad ke bina hum sab kuch nahi hai, buss apka ashirwad hamesha humare sath rakhna💫. Baas yeh chota sa khaat aap tak koi pocha de, ek akhiri baar koi apse baat krva de 💌🙏😭

Ending this week with some reflection about a beautiful experience, and it’s difficult to put into words how proud and grateful I feel to be part of the very first @cocokind Kindness Collective Ambassador Program.💛 This journey has been so much more than a title or a campaign — it’s been about becoming part of an exceptional community that sees people for who they really are.

To be surrounded by individuals who celebrate authenticity, embrace natural beauty, and lead with genuine kindness has been incredibly empowering. In a world that often pressures us to filter, perfect, and perform, this space has reminded me how powerful it is to just be yourself.

Living with kindness isn’t just a nice idea — it’s a daily practice, a way of showing up for ourselves and others with compassion, openness, and realness.

So here’s to the continuation of something beautiful, to the connections we’re building, and to every soul who chooses to lead with heart. I’m beyond honored to be a part of this movement. 💫

A conversation with the effortlessly brilliant Raghavendra Rathore about combining the best of Jodhpur and Japan resulted in this creation 

I’ll let the maestro describe this quietly elegant bespoke work in his own words below…

“Japan Meets Jodhpur”

1) The Collaboration

Some collaborations begin with strategy.
This began with conversation.
The Kasby Edit values precision and pause. So does bespoke.
Atul’s eye is exacting, never loud.
Like the ateliers of Europe and the karkhanas of Jodhpur, this piece was discussed into existence.

Not a merger but a meeting of minds. This is more than an outfit. It’s the echo of dialogue.

2) Japanese Ethos

Japan teaches restraint.
Space is presence, imperfection, grace.

The Bandhgala stands structured; Japanese avant-garde gently questions it.
Rooted in Jodhpur, shifted further east in spirit.
Subtle asymmetry. Intentional seams. 
Not fusion; just a quiet cultural exchange.

3) Fabric & The Modern Man

Fabric remembers.
Tropical weaves; light and enduring form the base. Fluidity with discipline
Longevity over noise.
Texture over excess.

From Jodhpur’s structure to Japan’s quiet rebellion, this work belongs to gentlemen who understand that elegance never needs to announce itself.
It quite simply, exists…”
 - Raghavendra Rathore

Where heritage and measured grandeur quietly inform design.

The Stylist’s Edit — Why I Skipped the “40 Yards of Lace” 🧵✨

Style Lesson: Luxury is an Edit, Not an Excess.

The recent conversation around Sobia Nazir’s 2026 Luxury Lawn has everyone asking the same thing: Do you really need 40 yards of lace to look like the catalog?
As a stylist, my answer is a firm No. In fact, over-accessorizing with lace can often bury the craftsmanship of the actual fabric. When I styled this Sobia Nazir piece, I chose Strategic Curation over the “more is more” trend. Here is the breakdown:
1. The “Visual Anchor” vs. Lace Noise 🦪
Instead of following the trend of layering multiple laces at the neck, I used a Handmade Multi-Strand Pearl Necklace. While others were adding “visual noise” with extra trimmings, the pearls provide a solid, classic texture. This acts as an anchor, framing the face and giving the outfit a structured, expensive feel that 40 yards of lace simply cannot provide.
2. Intentional Placement 📐
I kept the lace limited to the back borders and Trouser to define the silhouette. By “editing out” the excess, the intricate embroidery on the shirt finally has room to breathe. When you over-lace, the eye doesn’t know where to look. By simplifying, I made the luxury feel intentional, not cluttered.
3. The “Hard-meets-Soft” Rule 👠
Lace is soft and romantic. To keep it from looking “mushy,” I balanced it with structured accessories: a crisp white quilted bag and sharp pointed-toe heels. This creates a high-fashion contrast that elevates a standard Lawn suit into a dinner-ready ensemble.

The Revuist Rule: A designer provides the canvas, but a stylist provides the vision. Don’t be afraid to leave some lace in the box. 🛠️🤍

Are you team “Extra Lace” or team “Strategic Styling”? Let’s settle this in the comments! 👇

Style Lesson: How to Balance Heavy Textures 📐✨

When working with intricate cutwork and 3D lace, the goal is to enhance the detail, not compete with it. Here is the breakdown of how I styled this peach formal:

1. Creating a Visual Anchor 🦪
With a high, detailed neckline, a dainty chain would get lost. I handcrafted this multi-strand pearl necklace to provide “visual weight.” The volume of the pearls acts as a clean, solid focal point that breaks up the busy lace pattern and frames the face.
2. The Rule of Three (Color Breaking) 🤍
To keep a traditional look modern, I used a crisp white accent in three places: the pearls, the quilted bag, and the pointed heels. This creates a cohesive “visual triangle” that pulls the entire look together without adding unnecessary new colors.
3. Proportional Play 👠
Pairing a long-line kameez with wide-leg trousers is the ultimate “height hack.” The secret? A sharp, pointed-toe shoe to peek out from the hem, elongating the silhouette and preventing the fabric from looking heavy.

STOP over-accessorizing your Anarkalis! 🛑🖤

Most people think a heavy dress needs a heavy jewelry set. As a stylist, I’m here to tell you: Less is actually MORE. Here’s the breakdown of this “Regal Minimalist” look:
✨ The Neckline Rule: If your boat neck has intricate gold tilla, skip the necklace. Let the embroidery be the jewelry.
✨ The Sahara Lift: Swap the choker for oversized Sahara Jhumkas to elongate your neck and frame your face.
✨ Texture Layering: Chiffon with a heavy silk border. It adds depth to an all-black look so it doesn’t look “flat” in photos.
✨ The Cool-Girl Edge: Side-swept waves + a sharp winged liner. It breaks the traditional symmetry for a modern, high-fashion vibe.

The only 2 makeup maps you need for your Eid Jora. 🗺️💄

I’ve had so many styling consultations lately where the makeup ruins the outfit’s color theory. Don’t let that be you on Eid morning!

I’ve simplified it into two foolproof aesthetics:

🌷 THE SOFT EDIT (Pastels)
We’re talking “Glass Skin” and tonal harmony. Perfect if you’re wearing Mint, Lilac, or Butter Yellow. Keep the contrast low for a high-fashion finish.
🍷 THE SHARP EDIT (Bolds)
This is all about structure. A sharp wing and a deep lip. If you’re wearing Maroon, Emerald, or Navy, this adds the necessary “weight” to your face to match the fabric.

Pro-Tip: Save this for your 10 AM makeup ! 📌

2026 Brides: We are wearing the glow, not the mask. ✨

Can we finally admit it? Pakistani bridal makeup has become a disguise. Why is our parlor industry so obsessed with making every bride look like the same “painted doll”? Is it because the artists are lazy, or are brides just too scared to look like themselves? 🎤👇

My Honest Opinion: Makeup is meant to enhance your natural beauty, not over-exaggerate it. You are a bride, not a drag queen—and there is a massive difference between a wedding look and a fashion editorial.

⚠️ DISCLAIMER: This isn’t hate; it’s a reality check. As a stylist, my goal is to protect the “real” in royalty. Let’s bring back timeless elegance and leave the 5-inch foundation layers in the past.
Tell me in the comments: Is the “Parlor Look” a scam, or do brides actually ask for this? Let’s fight about it. ☕️

Let me reintroduce myself 🤍
I’m Kaitlyn! Mom of 3, runner, latte lover, and personal stylist.

Hi, I’m Kaitlyn (KP!) 👋
Mom of three littles (all 6 and under), runner, coffee enthusiast, and lifelong lover of fashion.

After stepping away from my corporate job in software sales 3 years ago to be home with my kids, what I thought would be a quick pause turned into a beautiful new chapter. But as I settled into mom life, I realized something: while I was pouring time and energy into keeping my kids dressed and ready for every moment, I had completely forgotten about me.

That’s when it hit me: busy women, especially moms, deserve to feel confident, comfortable, and stylish in their everyday lives too. Out of that spark, Shopped by KP was born. 💫

Whether you’re juggling school drop-offs, Zoom meetings, or a bit of both, I’m here to help you feel effortless and put-together in outfits that work with your lifestyle. 

Because when you feel good in what you’re wearing, everything else just flows. ✨

Here’s to embracing style that fits real life: messy, busy, beautiful and all. 
Let’s get dressed, together!🤍

#ShoppedByKP #EffortlessStyleMadeSimple #MomStyle #BusyButMakeItChic #StyledByKP

Wygodny pasek z automatyczną klamrą. Wykonany z solidnej skóry naturalnej kolorze granatowym. Cechą wyróżniającą są ozdobne czerwono-biało-granatowe przeszycia, które nadają mu eleganckiego i unikalnego wyglądu.
Klamra automatyczna to wygoda i precyzja. Pasek nie posiada dziurek, klamra zaciska się na specjalnej ząbkowanej listwie. Pozwala to na płynną regulację szerokości paska w dowolnym momencie. Dodatkowo klamra paska ma błyszczące wykończenie, co dodaje mu nowoczesności.
Unikalne cechy:

skóra naturalna: trwałość ,

klamra automatyczna: wygoda, precyzja, brak dziurek,

przeszycia: elegancki, unikalny design,

błyszczące wykończenie klamry: nowoczesny look.

Look 1: elevated casual style, blending classic preppy elements with modern tailoring. It’s a versatile look that transitions perfectly from a professional office setting to a weekend brunch. A tailored oversized plaid blazer in a rich chocolate and tan check. The structured shoulders and notched lapels add a sophisticated, professional edge. A classic navy button-up cardigan worn over a light blue striped oxford shirt. This „double-collar“ look adds depth and texture to the upper half of the outfit. High-waisted, straight-leg jeans in a medium indigo wash. The clean hem and structured fit keep the look polished rather than dressed-down and polished dark brown leather loafers, echoing the heritage aesthetic.
Look 2: Modern Nautical Chic, everyday style with this perfectly balanced ensemble that blends sporty functionality with understated luxury. This look is ideal for transitional seasons, city strolls, or casual weekend outings. Navy blue cropped puffer jacket with a sleek matte finish. Its lightweight yet insulating design provides warmth without the bulk, featuring a cozy integrated hood for those breezy afternoons. Beneath the jacket sits a classic midnight blue knit sweater, offering a tonal depth that keeps the silhouette sophisticated. High-waisted, crisp white straight-leg denim creates a sharp, clean contrast. The ankle-grazing length is specifically tailored to highlight your footwear choice and navy suede terrace sneakers with signature white stripes. They bring a vintage athletic vibe that grounds the outfit in comfort and street-style credibility.

Neutrals don’t have to be boring.
Add one intentional color and let it do the work.
Gold accessories add warmth and polish, making the look feel finished without overpowering it.
Neutrals can be anything from white, black, beige, grey, denim, or brown. Whether it’s a pants or Dress.
A pop of color can be subtle or bold (burgundy, olive, red, cobalt, or even metallics.)
Instead of matching everything, choose one or two elements to echo each other. Here, the bag and shoes carry the color while the rest stays neutral.
The Loafers elevate the look. Sneakers keep it relaxed.
Same base, different energy.
This works for a brunch date, church, a coffee run, or a casual hangout with friends.

🏛️ BRAND SPOTLIGHT: TAILOR’S GROOMING🍻
🇬🇧Who remembers the legendary beer stand from 2016? 🍺✂️ 
TAILOR’S GROOMING was there at the start, and we’ve built a bond with the brothers Jeroen and Robin Schenke over the last decade, who run this amazing men’s grooming brand.

From visiting Robin and owner René Held in Munich to their "on and off" involvement over the years, it’s only right that they join us for this 10-year milestone! 

They’re bringing back their famous "bar stand" to keep the vibes high and the conversations flowing. 🥨🥃

Come grab a drink and talk shop with the men behind TAILOR’S Grooming. 

🎟️ Get your ticket: 👉 #linkinbio
 🗓️ April 12
 📍 Hemkade 48, Zaandam (near Amsterdam)

 🇳🇱Wie herinnert zich de legendarische bierstand uit 2016 nog? 🍺✂️ 
TAILOR’S GROOMING was er vanaf het begin bij en we hebben het afgelopen decennium een mooie band met de broers Jeroen en Robin Schenke opgebouwd die dit geweldige merk runnen.

Van het bezoeken van Robin en eigenaar René Held in München tot hun betrokkenheid door de jaren heen: het is niet meer dan logisch dat ze erbij zijn voor deze mijlpaal van 10 jaar!

Ze brengen hun beroemde "barstand" terug om de sfeer erin te houden en de gesprekken op gang te brengen. 🥨🥃

Kom een drankje doen en praat bij met de mannen achter TAILOR’s Grooming!

🗓 Zondag 12 april 2026
 📍 Hemkade 48, Zaandam (vlakbij Amsterdam)
 🎟 Scoor je ticket via #linkinbio 💈🔥

📸 José Donatz, Arjen Veldt

Zelfverzekerd. Tijdloos. Onmiskenbaar.

🇦🇷Estilo de las argentinas 🇦🇷 🚨 𝗣𝗼𝘀𝘁 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗮 𝗴𝘂𝗮𝗿𝗱𝗮𝗿!
El estilo de las argentinas combina influencias europeas, practicidad urbana y atención a la imagen personal. 
Aunque varía según la región, hay rasgos característicos:

1. Naturalidad cuidada
Buscan un look natural, pero trabajado: arregladas sin esfuerzo, estar bien vestida sin parecer demasiado producida.
El maquillaje tiende a ser ligero y el cabello con movimiento (ondas naturales, suelto).

2. Elegancia relajada
Se valora el buen gusto y la proporción, más que el exceso o la ostentación. Prefieren la sofisticación sutil. Tienden a mezclar prendas clásicas con otras más actuales para verse modernas pero no extremas.

3. Urbano chic
En grandes ciudades, domina el estilo urbano y cosmopolita.
Jeans, blazers, remeras blancas, zapatillas y carteras de cuero son infaltables: modernas y femeninas, pero cómodas para la rutina diaria.

4. Detalles y accesorios
Se invierte en buenos accesorios: cartera de cuero, anteojos con diseño, zapatos de calidad. El calzado tiene protagonismo.
Accesorios con moderación: no buscan recargar, sino dar carácter.

5. Influencia europea y latina
Por herencia cultural, hay influencia italiana y francesa en la manera de vestir (cortes, siluetas, amor por el negro, y los neutros).
Pero con un toque latino de calidez, sensualidad y color: escotes sutiles, accesorios dorados, texturas livianas.

6. Adaptabilidad
Repiten y reinventan prendas: combinan, adaptan y aprovechan al máximo su guardarropa.
Siguen tendencias, pero con criterio personal.

》También hay arquetipos regionales en los que se expresa la identidad y el entorno en el vestir:
•Buenos Aires: Urbano sofisticado
•Mendoza: Sofisticación natural
•Córdoba: Creativa y femenina
•Noroeste: Folklórico moderno
•Patagonia: Chic funcional
•Región pampeana: Clásico versátil
•Litoral: Romántico y alegre

☆En síntesis, la argentina promedio logra equilibrar espontaneidad con sofisticación.
Natural, urbana, adaptable y con una actitud segura, el buen gusto por encima de la ostentación.

La chaqueta #bomber gamuzada es una de las piezas clave de la temporada.
Combina la silueta deportiva de la bomber con la textura sofisticada de la gamuza. El resultado es un abrigo relajado pero con mucha presencia.

En tonos tierra como chocolate, camel u oliva, se convierte en el comodín perfecto para elevar looks simples como jeans + remera, o para contrastar con prendas más femeninas como vestidos o faldas.
Un básico con textura, carácter y aire retro pero con un giro actual.

#𝐒𝐭𝐲𝐥𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐩𝐬
1.  Usala con prendas simples para que la textura sea la protagonista del look.

2.  Como la bomber suele tener volumen, equilibrala con prendas más ajustadas o rectas en la parte inferior. Así el look se ve armónico y la chaqueta se lleva todo el protagonismo.

El blazer con cinturón puede ser un antes y un después en tu look…
pero no se trata solo de “sumar un cinturón” 

Se trata de cómo lo usás según tu cuerpo, y usarlos estratégicamente.
Porque mientras en algunas siluetas define y potencia la figura,
en otras puede acortar o generar más volumen si no se aplica estratégicamente.

#𝐒𝐭𝐲𝐥𝐞𝐭𝐢𝐩𝐬
✔️ Cinturones más anchos para marcar curvas
✔️ Opciones finas o monocromáticas para estilizar
✔️ Ajuste, altura y proporción… lo cambian todo

La clave no es la prenda,
es cómo la llevás.

🎗#Broches: un detalle pequeño que cambia completamente el mensaje del look.

“Un detalle puede cambiarlo todo.
Los broches vuelven esta temporada como protagonistas: sofisticados, con presencia y mucha intención.

No son solo un accesorio vintage…
Son una herramienta de estilo.
✔ Elevan básicos
✔ Personalizan prendas neutras
✔ Aportan foco visual
✔ Definen tu mensaje
La clave es saber dónde colocarlo según tu estilo y silueta.

Formas de usarlo
✔ En la solapa del blazer (clásico renovado)
✔ En el cuello de una camisa cerrada
✔ Sujetando un pañuelo
✔ En la cintura marcando silueta
✔ En un sweater oversize para generar drapeado
✔ En el pelo (según tamaño)
✔ En cartera o bolso

➕️Te dejo estas ideas según tu estilo:
Clásico → broches estructurados, metálicos
Romántico → formas florales, perlas
Dramático → piezas grandes, escultóricas
Natural → madera, materiales orgánicos
Elegante → líneas limpias, minimalistas
Creativo → formas abstractas
Sensual → ubicación estratégica marcando curvas

¿Te animarías a incorporarlo?”

Cómo corregir los errores al vestir según tu estilo personal” 🚨 𝗣𝗼𝘀𝘁 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗮 𝗴𝘂𝗮𝗿𝗱𝗮𝗿!
 No se trata de tu cuerpo, sino de cómo expresás quién sos.

🔸️Estilo CLÁSICO
Error más común:
Ir siempre a lo seguro y verse rígida o predecible.
Clave: elegancia sin rigidez.

🔸️Estilo ROMÁNTICO
Error más común:
Exceso de delicadeza que resta estructura.
Clave: suavidad con intención.

🔸️Estilo NATURAL
Error más común:
Caer en lo desprolijo o demasiado informal.
Clave: relajado, no descuidado.

🔸️Estilo DRAMÁTICO
Error más común:
Exagerar líneas duras y verse distante.
Clave: fuerza con coherencia.

🔸️Estilo CREATIVO
Error más común:
Mezclar demasiado y perder foco.
Clave: expresión con orden.

“Cuando alineás cuerpo, estilo y personalidad,
vestirte deja de ser un problema se convierte en una forma de expresión”.

🔸️Estilo ELEGANTE
Error más frecuente:
Querer verse elegante recargando el look.
Clave: Menos cantidad,  mejor calidad

🔸️Estilo SEDUCTOR
Error más frecuente:
Mostrar demasiado al mismo tiempo.
Clave: Sugerir sin mostrar.

🇨🇦 Quick stop in Toronto during my work trip to Canada — and the first thing to do? Head straight to the CN Tower.

A glass of wine, evening light over the city, and those incredible views that make you pause for a moment before the busy schedule continues 🍷✨

P.S. I’m sure there are so many amazing places to discover in Toronto, but I only had about an hour in the city this time — hoping to explore much more on my next visit.

P.P.S. I was really hoping to catch the sunset from the tower, but Toronto traffic made me arrive just a little too late to see the sun go down 🙈

Closing the work week in one of my favorite combos lately — browns and blues with a blazer and denim.
Happy Friday 🤎
